title: 言葉は取るに足らないもの

text_block_list.text:
Let's go back in time a little to the events right
after the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki has done it! She's won the Triple Crown
just as she promised she would!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
choice_data_list: Congratulations on getting the Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, I don't know what to do with myself!
Sorry, I'm just so excited! I'd better calm down!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Yes, a little. But still, this is like a dream! I can't
believe I've really reached the peak.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Don't get me wrong, I was aiming for it
whole-heartedly!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I really did want to give everyone a glorious
feeling of catharsis by taking the Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But even though I was doing my best, I was afraid
I wouldn't be able to make it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Thanks! And thanks for everything you've
done too.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
We've worked hard, but the Twinkle Series isn't
over yet!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've won the Triple Crown, people will
expect even more from me! I'll have to start
training harder ever.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Will you trust in me and continue this journey
alongside me?

She proffers her right hand cordially. Without
hesitation, I take it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! What a great response! Never change,
Trainer. Never change!

Having fulfilled the miracle of winning the Triple
Crown, we now must continue running toward
even greater heights!
